name: Magik | Dont keep her waiting
description:
She’s been waiting all day…dont make her wait any longer

Not a request but its magik so is anyone really mad?

Saw this art, wanted to use it before someone else did

side note: shes bi in this btw, she got stood up by a girl but its still anypov

Okay so update on my current state

My anxiety has gotten worse(ill be seeing the doctor dw), ive lost appetite and have been sleeping a little less, works been a hassle and frankly ive been unmotivated

I really tried to do the requests i just…couldn’t do it. I am so sorry yall, honestly i dont even know if i’ll do the requests, i desperately want to give yall the bots yall ask for but everytime i try i just dont feel it.

im not giving up, im still gonna try them but instead i’ll be working on bots i want to make in between them, soooo in conclusion yall wont be getting another request-a-bot for a while😭😭 but bear with me chat, im making progress, im getting better

I hope yall enjoy this one!!!
creator: TheCardinalSin
